title: "Ternary Logic" (TL) Smart Contract ABI Bundle
description: Canonical ABI definitions for TL_Ledger_Core.sol and ITL_Validator.sol. Function signatures, event logs, custom errors, and structured data types only. No Solidity source code. Framework: "Ternary Logic" (TL) by Lev Goukassian. ORCID: 0009-0006-5966-1243. DOI: 10.1007/s43681-025-00910-6 | DOI: 10.1007/s43681-026-01124-0. Consistency Lock: all identifiers immutable from Steps 1 and 2.

TL_Ledger_Core.description: Core immutable ledger contract. Anchors Merkle roots, registers and verifies Permission Tokens, enforces NL=NA at the on-chain boundary (Layer 5), manages system-wide Epistemic Hold activation and resolution, executes Emergency Overrides under logged conditions, and broadcasts Lantern status. HybridShield quorum is required for all state-mutating operations. No admin key: governance is Tri-Cameral only.
TL_Ledger_Core.nlNaLayer5Note: TL_Ledger_Core.registerPermissionToken reverts NLNAViolation if the supplied logHash is not present in an anchored Merkle root. This is NL=NA Layer 5: the final on-chain enforcement gate. Bypassing Layers 1-4 in the off-chain stack does not bypass this layer.

abi.name: anchorMerkleRoot
abi.description: Anchor a Merkle root of a TGLF batch on-chain. Requires HybridShield custodian quorum. Reverts QuorumNotMet if quorum is not satisfied. Emits MerkleRootAnchored on success. This is the on-chain foundation for NL=NA Layer 5 enforcement: only logHashes provably included in an anchored root can produce valid Permission Tokens.

inputs.name: merkleRoot
inputs.description: SHA-256 Merkle root of the TGLF batch being anchored.

inputs.name: batchId
inputs.description: Unique batch identifier for this Merkle root submission.

inputs.name: quorumAttestation
inputs.description: ABI-encoded CustodianQuorumAttestation array proving HybridShield quorum. Must meet minimum custodian threshold before root is accepted.

inputs.name: committedAt
inputs.description: Unix epoch timestamp of batch commit.

outputs.name: anchorId
outputs.description: Unique on-chain identifier for this anchoring event.

abi.name: registerPermissionToken
abi.description: Register a Permission Token on-chain. NL=NA Layer 5: reverts NLNAViolation if the supplied logHash is not provably included in an anchored Merkle root via verifyMerkleInclusion. This is the terminal enforcement gate: no actuation may proceed without a registered, valid Permission Token whose logHash is on-chain verified.

inputs.name: tokenId
inputs.description: Permission Token unique identifier (keccak256 of UUID v4).

inputs.name: logHash
inputs.description: SHA-256 of the anchored TGLF entry. NL=NA Layer 5: MUST be provably included in an anchored Merkle root or transaction reverts NLNAViolation.

inputs.name: merkleRoot
inputs.description: The Merkle root in which logHash is claimed to be included.

inputs.name: merkleProof
inputs.description: Ordered sibling hash array forming the Merkle inclusion proof path.

inputs.name: epochTimestamp
inputs.description: Unix epoch timestamp of token issuance.

inputs.name: expiresAt
inputs.description: Unix epoch expiration timestamp. Actuation layer MUST reject tokens where block.timestamp >= expiresAt.

inputs.name: signerKeyId
inputs.description: HSM key identifier for Audit Lane signature verification.

inputs.name: laneOriginHash
inputs.description: keccak256("AUDIT_LANE"). Inference Lane token production is constitutionally blocked: any value not matching this hash reverts NLNAViolation.

inputs.name: signatureValue
inputs.description: Base64url-decoded HSM signature over the PermissionToken fields.

abi.name: verifyPermissionToken
abi.description: View function. Verify that a Permission Token is registered, non-expired, non-revoked, and its logHash is provably included in an anchored Merkle root.

abi.name: verifyMerkleInclusion
abi.description: Pure function. Verify that a leaf hash is included in a Merkle root given a proof path.

abi.name: activateEpistemicHoldSystemWide
abi.description: Activate system-wide Epistemic Hold (State 0). Requires HybridShield custodian quorum. Reverts QuorumNotMet if quorum not satisfied. All subsequent Permission Token registrations are blocked until hold is resolved. Emits EpistemicHoldActivated.

abi.name: resolveEpistemicHoldSystemWide
abi.description: Resolve a system-wide Epistemic Hold. resolvedState uint8: 1 = Proceed, 0 = Refuse (encoding). State 0 (Epistemic Hold) is not a valid resolution. Reverts InvalidResolutionState if resolvedState is any other value.

inputs.name: resolvedState
inputs.description: Resolution encoding: 1 = Proceed (+1), 0 = Refuse (-1). uint8(0) encodes REFUSE here, not Epistemic Hold. Any other value reverts InvalidResolutionState.
inputs.x-tl-encoding-note: uint8(0) = REFUSE (-1 integer), uint8(1) = PROCEED (+1 integer). Epistemic Hold re-resolution is constitutionally invalid.

abi.name: executeEmergencyOverride
abi.description: Execute Emergency Override under supreme authority. ALL invocations logged on-chain before execution. NL=NA applies without exception. forcedState uint8: 0 = Epistemic Hold, 255 = Refuse. Forced Proceed (+1) is constitutionally blocked. Emits EmergencyOverrideExecuted.

inputs.name: overrideType
inputs.description: 0=BREAK_GLASS_SHUTDOWN, 1=KILL_SWITCH, 2=FORCED_STATE_TRANSITION.

inputs.name: forcedState
inputs.description: 0=EpistemicHold, 255=Refuse. Proceed(+1) constitutionally blocked.
inputs.x-tl-encoding-note: uint8(0)=EpistemicHold(0), uint8(255)=Refuse(-1). Proceed(+1) is constitutionally blocked.

abi.name: revokePermissionToken
abi.description: Revoke a registered Permission Token. Revocation state machine: ACTIVE -> REVOKED_BY_EMERGENCY or REVOKED_BY_TRI_CAMERAL.

inputs.name: revocationReason
inputs.description: 1=REVOKED_BY_EMERGENCY, 2=REVOKED_BY_TRI_CAMERAL.

inputs.name: revocationStatus
inputs.description: 0=ACTIVE, 1=REVOKED_BY_EMERGENCY, 2=REVOKED_BY_TRI_CAMERAL.

inputs.name: resolvedState
inputs.description: 1=Proceed, 0=Refuse. Epistemic Hold re-resolution constitutionally invalid.

inputs.name: forcedState
inputs.description: 0=EpistemicHold, 255=Refuse. Proceed constitutionally blocked.

inputs.name: artifactNameHash
inputs.description: keccak256("lantern").

inputs.name: compliancePosture
inputs.description: 0=FULLY_COMPLIANT, 1=EPISTEMIC_HOLD_ACTIVE, 2=REGULATORY_REVIEW, 3=PILLAR_DEGRADED, 4=EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE_ACTIVE.

inputs.name: violationReason
inputs.description: 0=MERKLE_NOT_FOUND, 1=INVALID_LANE_ORIGIN.

ITL_Validator.description: Validator interface contract. Performs regulatory compliance verification (Pillars V and VI), Goukassian Principle license validation, and immutable mandate violation recording.

abi.name: verifyEconomicRightsCompliance
abi.description: Verify Pillar V compliance. Checks Basel III (LCR >= 1.0, NSFR >= 1.0), FATF (sanctions, PEP, SAR), IOSCO (layering, spoofing, wash trading). Returns compliant, violationCode, forcedState (0=EPISTEMIC_HOLD, 255=REFUSE).

abi.name: verifySustainableCapitalCompliance
abi.description: Verify Pillar VI compliance. Checks Paris Agreement (carbon footprint, green bond, ESG score).

abi.name: verifyGoukassianLicense
abi.description: Verify Goukassian Principle license scope. violatedArtifact ordinals: 1=lantern, 2=signature, 3=license. Exceeding scope triggers automatic Refuse (State -1).

abi.name: recordMandateViolation
abi.description: Record an immutable mandate violation. Immutable: cannot be modified or deleted once recorded.

inputs.name: mandateViolated
inputs.description: keccak256 of mandate string: keccak256("No Spy"), keccak256("No Weapon"), keccak256("No Switch Off").

inputs.name: pillarImplicated
inputs.description: 1=EpistemicHold, 2=ImmutableLedger, 3=GoukassianPrinciple, 4=DecisionLogs, 5=EconomicRightsAndTransparencyMandate, 6=SustainableCapitalAllocationMandate, 7=HybridShield, 8=Anchors.

abi.name: getMandateConfiguration
abi.description: View function. Retrieve current mandate configuration including Three Immutable Mandates and Eight Pillar threshold parameters.

inputs.name: domain
inputs.description: 0=general, 1=trade, 2=policy, 3=supply-chain.

outputs.name: pillarThresholds
outputs.description: Per-pillar thresholds scaled to 1e18 for Pillars I-VIII.

inputs.name: violatedArtifact
inputs.description: 1=lantern, 2=signature, 3=license.
